summary: E2E testing for appointment flow between Providers and Moms. All 11 backend API tests PASSED covering: connection requirements, appointment creation, accepting/declining, cancellation, notifications, and private notes visibility. Frontend UI testing was attempted but signup flow is not completing properly on web (stays on signup page after clicking Create Account).

critical.issue: Signup form submission not redirecting to onboarding/dashboard. Form stays on signup page after clicking Create Account button despite filled form data
critical.investigation_needed: Check if there's a validation error blocking submission or session token not being stored in browser

action_items: Investigate why web signup form submission doesn't redirect after clicking Create Account
Backend appointment APIs are fully functional - all E2E tests pass
critical_code_review_comments: Appointment API routes (lines 3020-3145 in server.py) properly implement: connection check before appointment creation, private notes visibility (hidden from Mom), status updates, notifications
Frontend appointments UI code exists at frontend/app/(mom)/appointments.tsx and frontend/src/components/ProviderAppointments.tsx with proper status grouping

success_rate.frontend: Not testable due to signup flow issue

test_credentials.created_via_api_tests: Multiple test users created with format test_mom_{uuid}@test.com, test_doula_{uuid}@test.com

seed_data_creation: Created via pytest: Mom users, Doula users, Midwife users, Share requests, and Appointments with various statuses
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend appointment APIs are fully working (all E2E tests pass). The API correctly: 1) Requires connection before appointment creation, 2) Hides private notes from Mom, 3) Creates notifications on invite/response, 4) Supports accept/decline/cancel. Frontend testing blocked due to signup form not redirecting. Consider using API-based session tokens to bypass signup flow for UI testing.

backend_test_coverage.test_provider_cannot_create_appointment_: PASSED - Verifies 403 returned when no connection
backend_test_coverage.test_e2e_flow_provider_creates_mom_accep: PASSED - Full flow: create -> pending -> accept -> accepted
backend_test_coverage.test_e2e_flow_provider_creates_mom_decli: PASSED - Full flow: create -> pending -> decline -> declined
backend_test_coverage.test_provider_cancels_accepted_appointme: PASSED - Provider cancels, both see cancelled status
backend_test_coverage.test_mom_appointments_grouped_by_status: PASSED - Appointments have proper status fields
backend_test_coverage.test_mom_cannot_see_private_notes: PASSED - notes field excluded for Mom
backend_test_coverage.test_notifications_created_on_appointmen: PASSED - appointment_invite and appointment_response notifications created
